name: osint-dezinformacia-monitor
description: Continuous OSINT monitor that ingests feeds, normalizes text, detects misinformation via regex/ML, enriches with Wikidata, and prepares fact-checked replies.

steps.name: ingest-feeds
steps.prompt: Ingest recent data from the following OSINT sources: {{input}}. Use web_fetch and web_search to gather content, authors, and timestamps.

steps.name: normalize-content
steps.prompt: Normalize the raw data: {{raw_data}}. Remove HTML tags, clean whitespace, and convert text to lowercase for standardized analysis.

steps.name: detect-misinformation
steps.prompt: Analyze {{normalized_data}} for misinformation. Use regex patterns for known keywords and cross-reference with the Google Fact Check API. Flag suspicious statements.

steps.name: enrich-with-context
steps.prompt: For each flagged statement in {{flagged_statements}}, search Wikidata and authoritative news archives to add context and verified entity information.

steps.name: prepare-responses
steps.prompt: Based on the enriched context: {{enriched_graph}}, draft polite but factual corrections. Prepare these as alerts for Slack and drafts for social media platforms.
